name: implement-calc
stdout:
Diff is scoped exactly to the `calc` method body — the test class and signature are untouched. The task is complete.

## Summary

Implemented `lcl_workdays=>calc` in `D:\AI PROJECT\sap-agentic-harness\src\zsah1_workdays.prog.abap`, replacing the `rv_days = -1.` stub. Logic: early-return 0 when `iv_from > iv_to`; otherwise a day-by-day `WHILE` loop from `iv_from` to `iv_to`, computing weekday via `TYPE d` arithmetic against a fixed 2024-01-01 (known Monday) reference date and `MOD 7` (floor-mod, so it's stable regardless of date direction), excluding Sat/Sun (dow 5/6) and any date present in `it_holidays` via `line_exists( it_holidays[ table_line = lv_date ] )`. The reasoning for the weekday mapping is documented in an English comment block directly above the code.

Verification performed:
- AC command `vsp lint --file src/zsah1_workdays.prog.abap` → `No issues found`, exit 0 (confirmed via explicit bash exit-code check).
- Desk-checked all 5 fixed test expectations by hand: weekdays_only=5, spans_weekend=4, excludes_holidays=4, same_day=1, inverted_range=0 — all matched.
- `domain/abap/CHECKLIST.md` offline items checked: no `EQ`/`NE` (used symbolic `>`/`<`/`<=` only), no line >255 chars, one statement per line, no empty statements, no hardcoded credentials, no `COMMIT` in loop, Z-prefix preserved, `CLASS/ENDCLASS`/`METHOD/ENDMETHOD` pairs intact.
- `git diff` confirms only `src/zsah1_workdays.prog.abap` (method body only, test class `ltc_workdays` and `calc` signature untouched) and `phases/1-workdays-util/index.json` changed — nothing else in the repo touched, no SAP connection commands run.

Updated `D:\AI PROJECT\sap-agentic-harness\phases\1-workdays-util\index.json` step 1 (`implement-calc`) to `"status": "completed"` with `summary` (full desk-check trace and rationale) and `contract` (calc body implemented, signature unchanged, offline-lint-only verified; ABAP Unit execution deferred to the connected phase) fields filled, plus `completed_at`. Validated the file is well-formed JSON. No commit was made, per the worker rules (harness commits after its own independent verify).
